Source   Edit  

Diplomacy System Types

Type definitions for diplomatic relations per diplomacy.md:8.1

Core diplomatic concepts:

  • DiplomaticState: Neutral, NonAggression, Enemy
  • Violations: Track pact violations and penalties
  • Dishonored Status: Reputational damage after violation
Configuration accessors per diplomacy.md:8.1.2 Values loaded from diplomacy.toml and prestige.tomlHelper Procs

Imports

../../common/types/core, ../../common/types/diplomacy, ../prestige, ../config/prestige_config, ../config/diplomacy_config

Types

DiplomaticEvent = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  otherHouse*: HouseId
  oldState*: DiplomaticState
  newState*: DiplomaticState
  turn*: int
  reason*: string
  prestigeEvents*: seq[PrestigeEvent]
Diplomatic status change event Source   Edit   
DiplomaticIsolation = object
  active*: bool
  turnsRemaining*: int
  violationTurn*: int
Track diplomatic isolation after violation (diplomacy.md:8.1.2) Source   Edit   
DiplomaticRelation = object
  state*: DiplomaticState
  sinceTurn*: int
Bilateral relationship between two houses Source   Edit   
DiplomaticRelations = object
  relations*: Table[HouseId, DiplomaticRelation]
All diplomatic relations for a house Key is other HouseId, value is relation with that house Source   Edit   
DiplomaticReport = object
  turn*: int
  events*: seq[DiplomaticEvent]
  violations*: seq[ViolationRecord]
Diplomacy phase report Source   Edit   
DishonoredStatus = object
  active*: bool
  turnsRemaining*: int
  violationTurn*: int
Track dishonored status after violation (diplomacy.md:8.1.2) Source   Edit   
ViolationHistory = object
  violations*: seq[ViolationRecord]
  dishonored*: DishonoredStatus
  isolation*: DiplomaticIsolation
Track violation history for repeat offenses Source   Edit   
ViolationRecord = object
  violator*: HouseId
  victim*: HouseId
  turn*: int
  description*: string
Record of non-aggression pact violation Source   Edit  

Procs

proc canFormPact(history: ViolationHistory): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check if house can form new non-aggression pacts (not isolated) Source   Edit   
proc canReinstatePact(history: ViolationHistory; otherHouse: HouseId;
                      currentTurn: int): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check if can reinstate pact with specific house (5 turn cooldown) Per diplomacy.md:8.1.2 Source   Edit   
proc countRecentViolations(history: ViolationHistory; currentTurn: int): int {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Count violations within repeat window Source   Edit   
proc dishonoredBonusPrestige(): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get dishonored bonus prestige from prestige config Source   Edit   
proc dishonoredDuration(): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get dishonored status duration from config Source   Edit   
proc getDiplomaticState(relations: DiplomaticRelations; otherHouse: HouseId): DiplomaticState {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get diplomatic state with another house (defaults to Neutral) Source   Edit   
proc initDiplomaticRelations(): DiplomaticRelations {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Initialize empty diplomatic relations Source   Edit   
proc initViolationHistory(): ViolationHistory {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Initialize empty violation history Source   Edit   
proc isEnemy(relations: DiplomaticRelations; otherHouse: HouseId): bool {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if house is enemy Source   Edit   
proc isInPact(relations: DiplomaticRelations; otherHouse: HouseId): bool {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if in non-aggression pact with house Source   Edit   
proc isolationDuration(): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get diplomatic isolation duration from config Source   Edit   
proc pactReinstatementCooldown(): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get pact reinstatement cooldown from config Source   Edit   
proc setDiplomaticState(relations: var DiplomaticRelations; otherHouse: HouseId;
                        state: DiplomaticState; turn: int) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Set diplomatic state with another house Source   Edit   
proc violationPrestigePenalty(): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get violation prestige penalty from prestige config Source   Edit   
proc violationRepeatPenalty(): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get repeat violation prestige penalty from prestige config Source   Edit   
proc violationRepeatWindow(): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get repeat violation window from config Source   Edit  

Exports

HouseId, DiplomaticState, PrestigeEvent, globalDiplomacyConfig
